title: Cable Facades
description: Adds Facades for all kind of pipes
body:
This mod adds Facade support for all most cables/blocks in the game !
---------------------------------------------------------------------

You can manually add entries in the config file at **cable\_facades-common.toml**

    #List of blocks that are allowed to be covered. Supports '*' as a wildcard.
    blocks = ["pipez:*_pipe", "mekanism:*_cable", "etc.."]

 **Tag is also available for blocks** **#cable\_facades:supports\_facade**

**Share your configs in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9) so that we expand support !**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_799ac466-1199-42c1-a33c-1c7145a85cf3.png)**

**When holding a wrench:**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c0b5fceb-370f-435b-bc24-67a0b5bc2dc7.png)**

 

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c229c68a-b522-4088-9a55-be35e323249e.png)**

**Coming soon:**

*   **1.21.1**
*   **Connected Textures support**
*   **Light Emitting Blocks**
*   **Light Obstruction**
